task_completion.description: Configure completion conditions for the five specified activities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing activity settings or the bulk activity completion page where conditions are set: 'Lab Safety and Ethics Module' requires viewing, 'Cell Membrane Transport Lab' requires submission, 'Molecular Biology Quiz' requires a passing grade (70%), 'Research Discussion Forum' requires posting, and 'Final Research Report' requires submission.

task_completion.description: Set course completion criteria to require all five activities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Course completion' settings page showing 'Condition: Activity completion' expanded, with all five activities checked to be required for course completion.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Advanced Cell Biology Scholar' badge with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the badge creation or management page showing the badge name 'Advanced Cell Biology Scholar' and the description 'Awarded to students who successfully complete all BIO302 Advanced Cell Biology course requirements including laboratory work, assessments, and discussions.'

task_completion.description: Set the badge criteria to course completion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the badge criteria configuration page showing that the criterion for awarding the badge is set to 'Course completion'.

task_completion.description: Set the badge expiry to 3 years after issuance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the badge settings or details page showing the expiry is configured as a 'Relative date' set to '3 years' after the date of issue.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and interacting with the Moodle web GUI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent performed the configurations in the correct course.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show 'BIO302' or 'Advanced Cell Biology' in the course header, breadcrumbs, or navigation menu.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configurations rather than just typing them in without saving.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show confirmation messages (e.g., 'Changes saved') or the final summary pages displaying the configured settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course shortname: BIO302. Activity types and required completion conditions: 'Lab Safety and Ethics Module' (Page, view), 'Cell Membrane Transport Lab' (Assignment, submit), 'Molecular Biology Quiz' (Quiz, pass grade 70%), 'Research Discussion Forum' (Forum, post), 'Final Research Report' (Assignment, submit). Badge Name: 'Advanced Cell Biology Scholar'. Badge Expiry: 3 years (relative to issuance).
